desc: Identifier assigned to the reporting financial institution.
Code representing the federal agency with supervisory authority over the reporting institution.
Flag indicating whether the loan record failed any internal validity or quality edits during data processing.
Metropolitan Statistical Area (MSA) or Metropolitan Division (MD) where the property securing the loan is located.
Two-digit FIPS code identifying the US state where the property is located.
Three-digit FIPS code identifying the county where the property is located.
Census tract number where the property is located, utilized for evaluating neighborhood-level demographic and economic patterns.
Record identifier assigned by the reporting institution.
Classification of the loan as conventional or government-backed.
Structural classification of the property securing the loan.
Classification of the borrower's primary intent for taking out the loan.
Borrower's intended occupancy status for the property.
Total loan amount requested or originated, expressed in thousands of dollars.
Flag indicating whether the applicant requested a formal preapproval assessment prior to property identification.
Final disposition of the loan application.
Self-reported or observed ethnic background of the primary applicant.
Self-reported racial category of the primary applicant.
Self-reported or observed biological sex of the primary applicant.
Gross annual income relied upon for creditworthiness evaluation, expressed in thousands of dollars.
Type of institutional entity that purchased the loan on the secondary market within the reporting year.
Primary factor for denying the loan application.
Flag indicating whether the loan meets high-cost thresholds under the Home Ownership and Equity Protection Act (HOEPA).
Lien priority status of the loan.
Flag indicating whether the application was received before or after January 1, 2004.
Total estimated population within the property's census tract.
Percentage of the census tract population identifying as a minority race or ethnicity.
Annual median family income for the Metropolitan Statistical Area or division, as estimated by the FFIEC.
Census tract median family income as a percentage of the MSA/MD median family income.
Count of owner-occupied residential units in the census tract.
Count of 1-to-4 family residential units in the census tract.
